user.title: Sonos Hue Sync
user.description: Update the speaker, Hue targets, and palette behavior.

data_description.sonos_entity: Choose the Sonos media player to follow. For grouped speakers, choose the room that shows the active track title, artist, album, and album art.
data_description.light_entities: Main targets to control. Select the Hue room/group you normally want synced, or select individual lights. If a selected room/group exposes its member lights, colors are distributed across those members.
data_description.group_entities: Optional additive workaround. Add real Hue room, zone, or group entities only when the main Hue lights / groups selection does not expose all of its members. These are added to the main targets, not used instead of them. Avoid adding helper zones here if you do not want the entire zone treated as one target.
data_description.member_light_entities: Optional additive override. Add specific individual lights that should always be controlled directly. Use this for missing bulbs or Hue Play lights when group expansion does not resolve them. Do not add room/group helper entities here.
data_description.color_count: Number of album-art colors to keep, from 1 to 10. With Dominant Colors First, this means the top N most common usable colors. If there are more target lights than colors, colors repeat.
data_description.transition: Fade time in seconds for each light change. Higher values are smoother but slower; lower values respond faster.
data_description.monochrome_mode: Controls black, white, or grayscale album art handling.
data_description.cache: Reuse colors for album art that has already been processed. Disable while tuning palette behavior if you want every extraction recalculated.
data_description.expand_groups: When enabled, colors are applied to individual lights inside selected groups when Home Assistant exposes those members. Disable only if you want one color applied to each selected group entity.
data_description.assignment_strategy: Controls how the already-extracted palette is distributed across selected lights. Sequential preserves the selected Palette Ordering most directly.
data_description.true_gradient_mode: Experimental. Use Hue direct control for supported gradient lights.
data_description.gradient_color_points: Number of color points sent to supported gradient lights.
data_description.gradient_order_mode: Controls how supported gradient lights arrange the already-extracted palette across their gradient points.
data_description.min_brightness: Lowest brightness Sonos Hue Sync may apply to standard lights.
data_description.max_brightness: Highest brightness Sonos Hue Sync may apply to standard lights.
data_description.gradient_brightness: Maximum brightness used for supported gradient lights when True Gradient is enabled.
data_description.exclude_light_entities: Lights that should never be controlled, even if they are part of a selected group.
data_description.restore_delay: Seconds to wait after music stops before restoring the previous light state. If music resumes during the delay, restore is cancelled.
data_description.artwork_fallback_mode: Controls what happens when album art cannot be retrieved.
data_description.airplay_poll_interval: How often to check the selected Sonos speaker while playing. Helps catch AirPlay metadata or artwork changes when Sonos events are inconsistent.
data_description.auto_rotate_colors: Automatically cycles the current color palette while music is playing.
data_description.auto_rotate_interval: Total cycle time between automatic color rotations. Transition Time is treated as the fade portion of this cycle, with a conservative internal safety buffer to avoid overlapping Hue updates. Changes take effect immediately while Auto Rotate Colors is running.
data_description.palette_ordering: Choose how the extracted palette is ordered before colors are assigned to lights. Vivid Colors First keeps the existing behavior and favors saturated, visually distinct colors. Dominant Colors First keeps the most common usable album-art colors first, so a lower Number of Colors uses the top dominant colors.
data_description.color_accuracy_mode: Choose the overall color extraction style. Natural is balanced for most albums, Vivid favors saturated accent colors, and Album Accurate keeps more muted or neutral artwork tones.
data_description.rotation_mode: Choose whether color assignments shift on each track change, auto-rotate on a timer, both, or not at all. Track-change rotation prevents the same lights from staying tied to the same palette slot across albums.
data_description.control_mode: Choose Basic for guided everyday controls or Advanced (Custom) when you want every tuning control available.
data_description.brightness_level: Simple brightness preset used by Basic mode. Advanced users can still tune minimum, maximum, and gradient brightness separately.

init.title: Sonos Hue Sync options
init.description: Update the speaker, Hue targets, and palette behavior.

extract_now.name: Refresh Colors
extract_now.description: Force fresh album-art extraction and apply colors immediately.

apply_last_palette.name: Rotate Colors
apply_last_palette.description: Rotate the current palette across the selected lights.

test_rainbow.name: Test Lighting
test_rainbow.description: Apply a test palette to verify target distribution.

show_help.name: Help & Guide
show_help.description: Open a quick guide with setup, troubleshooting, and diagnostics instructions.

health_check.name: Health Check
health_check.description: Check Sonos, Hue, targets, gradients, and recent processing status.

enabled.name: Sync Active
enabled.description: Turn Sonos Hue Sync on or off. When disabled, music playback will not change lights and the previous lighting state is restored.

filter_dull.name: Filter Dull Colors
filter_dull.description: Remove gray, muddy, and low-saturation tones.

filter_bright_white.name: Filter Harsh Whites
filter_bright_white.description: Reduce pure/cool whites while keeping cream and warm whites.

low_color_handling.name: Stabilize Low-Color Art
low_color_handling.description: Keep nearly monochrome covers from becoming overly saturated.

expand_groups.name: Distribute Across Group Lights
expand_groups.description: Apply colors to individual lights inside groups when available.

true_gradient_mode.name: Enable True Gradient
true_gradient_mode.description: Use Hue direct control for supported gradient lights.

auto_rotate_colors.name: Auto Rotate Colors
auto_rotate_colors.description: Automatically cycles the current color palette while music is playing.

assignment_strategy.name: Color Distribution Mode
assignment_strategy.description: Choose how the extracted palette is distributed across lights. Sequential preserves the selected Palette Ordering most directly.

monochrome_mode.name: Black & White Handling
monochrome_mode.description: Choose how black-and-white album art becomes light colors.

gradient_order_mode.name: Gradient Pattern
gradient_order_mode.description: Choose how supported gradient lights arrange the selected palette across gradient points.

palette_ordering.name: Palette Ordering
palette_ordering.description: Choose whether extracted palettes favor vivid visual variety or the most dominant album-art colors first.

artwork_fallback_mode.name: Artwork Fallback
artwork_fallback_mode.description: Choose what happens when album art is missing or temporarily unavailable.

white_handling.name: White Color Handling
white_handling.description: Controls whether white and cream tones are allowed, always filtered, or suppressed only when album art also contains real colors.

rotation_mode.name: Color Rotation Mode
rotation_mode.description: Controls whether colors rotate on track changes, on a timer, both, or not at all.

white_filter_strength.name: White Filtering Strength
white_filter_strength.description: Controls how aggressively pale whites, cream tones, blue-gray, and low-saturation colors are removed from the palette.

control_mode.name: Control Mode
control_mode.description: Choose Basic for guided everyday controls or Advanced (Custom) for full tuning.

brightness_level.name: Brightness Level
brightness_level.description: Set a simple overall brightness preset for synced lights.

color_count.name: Number of Colors
color_count.description: Set how many album-art colors are kept. With Dominant Colors First, this uses the top N dominant usable colors.

transition.name: Transition Time
transition.description: Set the fade duration for light changes.

gradient_color_points.name: Gradient Detail Level
gradient_color_points.description: Set the number of color points sent to gradient lights.

min_brightness.name: Minimum Brightness
min_brightness.description: Lowest brightness Sonos Hue Sync may apply to standard lights.

max_brightness.name: Maximum Brightness
max_brightness.description: Highest brightness Sonos Hue Sync may apply to standard lights.

gradient_brightness.name: Gradient Brightness
gradient_brightness.description: Maximum brightness used for supported gradient lights when True Gradient is enabled.

restore_delay.name: Restore Delay
restore_delay.description: Seconds to wait after music stops before restoring the previous light state. If music resumes during the delay, restore is cancelled.

auto_rotate_interval.name: Auto Rotation Interval
auto_rotate_interval.description: Total cycle time between automatic color rotations. Transition Time is treated as the fade portion of this cycle, with a conservative internal safety buffer to avoid overlapping Hue updates. Changes take effect immediately while Auto Rotate Colors is running.

show_help.name: Show help
show_help.description: Show a Sonos Hue Sync guide, including diagnostics instructions.

health_check.name: Health check
health_check.description: Run a Sonos Hue Sync health check and show the result as a Home Assistant notification.
